name: compliance-surveillance-team
description: A POC virtual compliance-surveillance ENGINEERING team for Claude Code: 16 subagents (PM-orchestrated builders + read-only reviewers) that build, test, review and hand over surveillance solutions - detection rules, data pipelines, transformation scripts, ML - with a data-safety pipeline, a modular code-review subsystem (review lenses + scoreboard, integrating turingmind-code-review, MIT), and audit-ready, evidenced deliverables.
